name: @elumixor/react-telegram
description: Stream React JSX into editable Telegram messages. Built on @elumixor/react-message-renderer + grammy.

scripts.build: bun run predev:dedupe-react && bun run build:clean && bun run build:bundle && bun run build:declaration
scripts.check: bun run predev:dedupe-react && tsc --noEmit --preserveSymlinks && bun run lint && biome format .
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m "Release v%s" && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m "Release v%s" && git push --tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major -m "Release v%s" && git push --tags

author: elumixor
